def negative_invariant_template_or_prefix_string_reformatted_inside_loop():
    rule_id = "invariant_template_or_prefix_string_reformatted_inside_loop"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that reformat constant template fragments on each iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
